description: This pipeline splits a hyperstack into individual slices. The main step involves taking a hyperstack and splitting it by a selected dimension.

c6fe2bad-a88e-4872-862d-c0cae03c72fc.name: ij1-dimensions-hyper-stacksplitter
c6fe2bad-a88e-4872-862d-c0cae03c72fc.description: Splits a hyperstack by a selected dimension into a single or multiple output slots. Multiple output slots can be utilized to split specific indices.

47c49164-bed6-4aef-87b5-36f5473a4b21.name: image-properties-to-annotation
47c49164-bed6-4aef-87b5-36f5473a4b21.description: Adds data annotations that contain the image properties.
